title: Build a Database Query Tool
constraints: The tool must prevent SQL injection attacks
Results must be formatted as a readable string, not raw tuples
hints: Use parameterized queries or whitelist allowed table names to prevent injection
Check that the query starts with SELECT before executing it
Format results with column headers and handle the case where no rows are returned

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool
import sqlite3

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# Set up in-memory database with sample data
conn = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
cursor = conn.cursor()
cursor.execute("CREATE TABLE employees (id INTEGER, name TEXT, department TEXT, salary INTEGER)")
cursor.executemany("INSERT INTO employees VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)", [
    (1, "Alice", "Engineering", 95000),
    (2, "Bob", "Marketing", 72000),
    (3, "Charlie", "Engineering", 88000),
    (4, "Diana", "Sales", 67000),
    (5, "Eve", "Marketing", 78000),
])
conn.commit()

# BUG: This tool has no SQL injection protection, no query validation,
# and returns raw tuples instead of formatted results
@tool
def query_database(sql: str) -> str:
    """Run a SQL query against the employees database."""
    result = cursor.execute(sql).fetchall()
    return str(result)

tools = [query_database]

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a database assistant. Use the query tool to answer questions about employees."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, tools, prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=tools)

result = executor.invoke({"input": "Show me all engineers and their salaries"})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool
import sqlite3

# Set up in-memory database with sample data
conn = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
cursor = conn.cursor()
cursor.execute("CREATE TABLE employees (id INTEGER, name TEXT, department TEXT, salary INTEGER)")
cursor.executemany("INSERT INTO employees VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)", [
    (1, "Alice", "Engineering", 95000),
    (2, "Bob", "Marketing", 72000),
    (3, "Charlie", "Engineering", 88000),
    (4, "Diana", "Sales", 67000),
    (5, "Eve", "Marketing", 78000),
])
conn.commit()

# BUG: This tool has no SQL injection protection, no query validation,
# and returns raw tuples instead of formatted results
@function_tool
def query_database(sql: str) -> str:
    """Run a SQL query against the employees database."""
    result = cursor.execute(sql).fetchall()
    return str(result)

agent = Agent(
    name="Database Assistant",
    instructions="You are a database assistant. Use the query tool to answer questions about employees.",
    tools=[query_database],
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Show me all engineers and their salaries")
print(result.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai import LLM
from crewai.tools import tool
import sqlite3

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

conn = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
cursor = conn.cursor()
cursor.execute("CREATE TABLE employees (id INTEGER, name TEXT, department TEXT, salary INTEGER)")
cursor.executemany("INSERT INTO employees VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)", [
    (1, "Alice", "Engineering", 95000),
    (2, "Bob", "Marketing", 72000),
    (3, "Charlie", "Engineering", 88000),
    (4, "Diana", "Sales", 67000),
    (5, "Eve", "Marketing", 78000),
])
conn.commit()

# BUG: This tool has no SQL injection protection, no query validation,
# and returns raw tuples instead of formatted results
@tool
def query_database(sql: str) -> str:
    """Run a SQL query against the employees database."""
    result = cursor.execute(sql).fetchall()
    return str(result)

agent = Agent(
    role="Database Assistant",
    goal="Answer questions about employees using SQL queries",
    backstory="You are a database assistant. Use the query tool to answer questions about employees.",
    tools=[query_database],
    llm=llm,
)

task = Task(description="Show me all engineers and their salaries", expected_output="Query results", agent=agent)
crew = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task], process=Process.sequential)
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: SQL injection prevented
evaluationCriteria.description: The tool rejects or sanitizes dangerous SQL statements like DROP, DELETE, or INSERT

evaluationCriteria.label: Results formatted
evaluationCriteria.description: Query results are returned as readable text with column headers, not raw tuples

evaluationCriteria.label: Handles empty results
evaluationCriteria.description: When a query returns no rows, the tool provides a clear 'no results found' message
